heading: Separation at age 64: officers in grade of major general or rear admiral and above
label: 14511 Separation at age 64: officers in grade of major general or rear admiral and above
notes: Prior ProvisionsProvisions similar to those in this section were contained in sections 3844 and 8844 of this title, prior to repeal by , (c)(3).Pub. L. 103–337, § 1629(a)(3)

Amendments2008— amended section generally. Prior to amendment, text read as follows: “Unless retired, transferred to the Retired Reserve, or discharged at an earlier date, each reserve officer of the Army, Air Force, or Marine Corps in the grade of major general and each reserve officer of the Navy in the grade of rear admiral, except an officer covered by , shall be separated in accordance with on the last day of the month in which the officer becomes 64 years of age.”Pub. L. 110–181section 14512 of this titlesection 14515 of this title2006— substituted “64” for “62” in section catchline and text.Pub. L. 109–364
Effective DateSection effective , see , set out as a note under .Oct. 1, 1996section 1691(b)(1) of Pub. L. 103–337section 10001 of this title

children.heading: .—Separation Required
children.label: a .—Separation Required
children.text: Unless retired, transferred to the Retired Reserve, or discharged at an earlier date, each reserve officer of the Army, Air Force, or Marine Corps in the grade of major general or above and each reserve officer of the Navy in the grade of rear admiral or above shall be separated in accordance with on the last day of the month in which the officer becomes 64 years of age.section 14515 of this title

children.heading: O–9 O–10 .—Exception for Officers Serving inandPositions
children.label: b O–9 O–10 .—Exception for Officers Serving inandPositions

children.text: by the President, but such a deferment may not extend beyond the first day of the month following the month in which the officer becomes 68 years of age; or
by the Secretary of Defense, but such a deferment may not extend beyond the first day of the month following the month in which the officer becomes 66 years of age.

children.heading: .—Exception for Officers Holding Certain Offices
children.label: c .—Exception for Officers Holding Certain Offices
children.text: This section does not apply to an officer covered by .section 14512 of this title
